title: Lenskit Federation Trace
description: Diagnostic execution trace of a federated query across multiple bundles.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the query was executed.

total_results.description: Total number of candidate hits found across all queried bundles before top-k slicing.

bundles.description: Status trace for each queried bundle.

repo_id.description: Unique identifier for the repository bundle.

bundle_path.description: Path or URI to the bundle root.

status.description: Execution status of the bundle query.

fingerprint.description: Computed or retrieved fingerprint of the bundle index.

latency_ms.description: Optional time taken to execute the query against this bundle in milliseconds.

error_message.description: Optional error message if status is 'error' or 'query_error'.
